name: Cherry Dump Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 Box white or yellow cake mix
1/2 cup Chopped nuts (walnuts or pecans preferred)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixer, blend the cake mix with the butter until it is fine and crumbly.
2. Set aside about 1 cup of the mixture.
3. Press the remainder into the bottom of a 9x14" baking pan.
4. Bake at 350°F for about 15 minutes, or until lightly browned.
5. Pour the cherry pie filling over the hot baked crust.
6. Mix the chopped nuts with the remaining cake mix mixture and sprinkle over the pie filling.
7. Return to the oven for about 30-40 minutes, or until the topping is lightly browned.
8. Serve with a scoop of vanilla ice cream or whipped cream.
Variations might be: Use chocolate cake mix and use apple pie filling, or chocolate cake mix and cherry pie filling. Use your imagination.
